\tzpentry{ID4424}{Connection Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4424 introduces Connection Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Gamma^{\lambda}{}_{\mu\nu} = \frac{1}{2} g^{\lambda\sigma} \bigl( \partial_{\mu} g_{\sigma\nu} + \partial_{\nu} g_{\sigma\mu} - \partial_{\sigma} g_{\mu\nu} \bigr) + \pi\,\delta_{\mu}^{\mathrm{kiss}}\, \delta^{\lambda}{}_{\nu}, \end{equation}
